subject: Fw: 1055 Park Entrance
body:
Hello hello ..........
Clensing?
Bellow R just info -Graund plans,.... On the building. Just that U know that the entrance is on Park AV.

Hugs

Subject: 1055 Park Entrance


Attached is a rendering and floorplan. The main entrance is on Park with an awning. There is a secondary entrance on 87th and a service entrance on 87th.
